classObjective: Write coordinate proofs for geometric statements about triangles.
workedExamples: 14-7, Example 3 — Write Coordinate Proofs (Midsegment Theorem, Perpendicular Bisector)
14-7, Example 4 — Write Coordinate Proofs (Segment Equals Half Hypotenuse Using Coordinate Formulas)
warmUp: How do you prove a point is the midpoint of a segment using coordinates?
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: midsegment theorem proof; perpendicular bisector; segment equals half hypotenuse; coordinate formula application to proofs
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice writing coordinate proofs for triangle-related statements
independentPractice: Practice problems writing coordinate proofs for geometric statements about triangles
assessment: Exit ticket: write a coordinate proof showing the midpoint of the hypotenuse of a right triangle is equidistant from all three vertices
capReflection: How does coordinate geometry allow you to prove geometric theorems algebraically?
